name: Pheasant in a Bag
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the pheasant inside and out with salt and pepper.
2. Rub butter on the outside of the pheasant.
3. Add minced garlic, chopped onion, and a small amount of butter to the cavity of the bird.
4. Place the pheasant in a brown bag and secure the end.
5. Set the pheasant on a cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 1 hour and 30 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
